title: Harder Mode
description: A datapack that increase mob difficulty after entering the nether
body:
After entering the Nether, the difficulty of the game increases to better suit the player's progression. Mobs not only get straight buffs, but also new behaviors and new variants.

### New Variants

- Miner Zombie - Carries an iron pickaxe and torch. Can mine cobblestone, cobbled deepslate, and netherrack.

- Skeleton King - Rides a skeleton horse with a shield.

### New Behaviors

- Cave Spiders are now infested and poison the player if they are within 3 blocks.
- Creepers can now be charged (regardless of weather). Planning to add a silent variant.
- Drowned get a speed boost when in water.
- Endermen inflict darkness on you if you aggro them (they also break boats now).
- Husks now have fire resistance.
- Iron Golems move faster when a player aggros them.
- Phantoms give weakness to nearby players.
- Skeletons can detect you from farther ranges and now back away when you get close to them.
- Spiders have a random chance to spawn with a cave spider riding them like a jockey.
- Strays have Frost Walker (without boots).
- Witches give speed, strength, and resistance to other nearby mobs.
- Zombies can now spawn reinforcements (reinforcements get weakness upon being summoned).

### New Mobs

- Killer Rabbit
- Giant Zombie

If you have any suggestions or bug fixes, feel free to contact me on Discord:
Discord: HD_Nyx (DMs are open)
